name: Manage Network Assets
description: Plan, procure, maintain, and retire physical distribution network assets including poles, transformers, and substations.

name: Process Customer Billing
description: Generate invoices, process payments, and manage billing inquiries for customer accounts.

name: Respond to Outages
description: Detect, diagnose, dispatch, and restore electrical supply following unplanned outages.

name: Procure & Inventory Materials
description: Source, receive, store, and issue materials and equipment required for network operations.

name: Manage Financial Ledger
description: Maintain the general ledger, manage accounts payable/receivable, and execute month-end close.

name: Recruit & Onboard Staff
description: Manage recruitment, onboarding, payroll processing, and employee record maintenance.

name: Maintain Customer Accounts
description: Create and update customer accounts, manage premise details, and handle service requests.

name: Backstop
description: Deploy and operate the LV DERMS system for controlling inverter-connected distributed energy resources at customer sites, leveraging ADMS for voltage management, onboarding new inverter connections, commissioning inverters via authorised third-party installers, and curtailing export during minimum system load events.
